localizations.en: This is a translation. Only the %@ version is legally binding.
localizations.de: Dies ist eine Übersetzung. Nur die %@ Fassung ist rechtsverbindlich.
localizations.fr: Ceci est une traduction. Seule la version %@ fait foi.

localizations.hu: Ez egy fordítás. Csak a %@ változat jogilag kötelező érvényű.
localizations.ro: Aceasta este o traducere. Doar versiunea în %@ este obligatorie din punct de vedere juridic.

localizations.sv: Detta är en översättning. Endast den %@ versionen är juridiskt bindande.
localizations.nb: Dette er en oversettelse. Kun den %@ versjonen er juridisk bindende.

localizations.zh-Hans: 这是翻译版本。仅%@版本具有法律约束力。

snippets.comment: Title for the snippets listing page.

allSnippets.comment: Back link text from snippet detail page to snippets listing. Renderer adds arrow prefix.

followMeArticle.comment: Follow-me message shown at the end of blog articles. %@ = social link HTML.

localizations.en: Enjoyed this article? Follow me on %@ for more Swift tips and indie dev updates.
localizations.de: Hat dir dieser Beitrag gefallen? Folge mir auf %@ für mehr Swift-Tipps und Indie-Dev-Updates.

followMeShort.comment: Follow-me message shown at the end of short content (snippets). %@ = social link HTML.

localizations.en: Found this helpful? Follow me on %@ for more Swift tips and indie dev updates.
localizations.de: War das hilfreich? Folge mir auf %@ für mehr Swift-Tipps und Indie-Dev-Updates.
localizations.ja: 参考になりましたか？%@でフォローして、Swiftのヒントやインディー開発の最新情報をチェックしてください。
localizations.tr: İşine yaradı mı? Swift ipuçları ve indie geliştirici güncellemeleri için %@ üzerinden takip et.

connectorAnd.comment: Connector word used to join the last two items in a list (e.g., 'Mastodon and GitHub').

builtWith.comment: Attribution text in footer. %@ = product name (SiteKit).

podcastShowNotes.comment: Section heading for episode show notes.

podcastDownloadMP3.comment: Link text for downloading the episode MP3.

podcastPreviousEpisode.comment: Navigation label for previous episode. Renderer adds arrow prefix.

podcastNextEpisode.comment: Navigation label for next episode. Renderer adds arrow suffix.

podcastAllEpisodes.comment: Back link text to all episodes listing. Renderer adds arrow prefix.

podcastEpisodes.comment: Title for the episode listing page.

podcastLatestEpisodes.comment: Section title for latest episodes on podcast home page.

podcastViewAllEpisodes.comment: Link on podcast home page to view all episodes. Renderer adds arrow suffix.

localizations.ja: すべてのエピソードを見る

podcastSubscribeFeed.comment: Tooltip/title for the podcast feed subscribe link.

localizations.ja: ポッドキャストフィードを購読

podcastSubscribeLabel.comment: Label above the podcast subscribe links section on the home page.

doccSearch.comment: Label in the DocC appbar search pill. Short, verb-form: shown next to the search icon and a keyboard shortcut hint.

doccFilter.comment: Placeholder text for the pinned sidebar tree-filter input box. Distinguishable from the appbar full-text search.

localizations.ja: セッションと年を絞り込む

doccContributors.comment: Label for the collapsible Contributors group in the DocC sidebar tree.

doccStubTitle.comment: Tooltip shown on stub session rows in the DocC sidebar – sessions that exist but have no notes yet.

localizations.ja: まだメモがありません

doccThemeLight.comment: Label for the Light option in the sidebar theme-switch segmented control.

doccThemeDark.comment: Label for the Dark option in the sidebar theme-switch segmented control.

doccThemeAuto.comment: Label for the Auto (follow system preference) option in the sidebar theme-switch segmented control.

doccThemeToggle.comment: Accessible label for the single appbar theme toggle button that flips between light and dark appearance.

doccHomeOverview.comment: Section heading for the Overview block on the DocC home page.

doccHomeContributing.comment: Section heading for the Contributing block on the DocC home page.

doccHomeTopics.comment: Section heading for the Topics card grid on the DocC home page.

doccHomeYearCardLink.comment: Call-to-action link label on each per-year card in the Topics grid.

doccHomeContributorsLink.comment: Call-to-action link label on the Contributors mosaic card.

doccYearEyebrow.comment: Small-caps eyebrow label above the year title on the DocC year overview page.

doccYearStatsNotes.comment: Stat label for published (non-stub) session notes on the year stats row.

doccYearStatsSessions.comment: Stat label for all sessions (including stubs) on the year stats row.

doccYearStatsTopics.comment: Stat label for topic groups on the year stats row.

doccStubPillLabel.comment: Inline status badge on session rows that have no written notes yet.

doccMoreSessions.comment: Fallback group heading for sessions not covered by any named topic group.

doccWatchVideo.comment: Label for the Watch Video call-to-action button on the article meta row. Shown alone or with duration suffix: 'Watch Video (14 min)'.

doccReadTime.comment: Suffix for the read-time indicator on the article meta row. Appears after a number, e.g. '6 min read'.

doccQuickReadTag.comment: Pill label inside the Quick Read TLDR card, replacing the raw 'Quick Read' prefix the author writes in the blockquote.

doccWrittenBy.comment: Section heading for the Written By author block below the article body.

doccRelatedSessions.comment: Section heading for the Related Sessions list at the bottom of the article.

doccContributedNotes.comment: Link label pointing to a contributor's contributed-notes listing page.

doccCommunityLabel.comment: Label for the Community mode card in the Community/AI variant switcher.

doccCommunitySubtitle.comment: Sub-label for the Community mode card in the variant switcher.

doccAILabel.comment: Label for the AI mode card in the Community/AI variant switcher.

doccAISubtitle.comment: Sub-label for the AI mode card in the variant switcher. Describes how the notes were produced – not on-device, but by the build pipeline.

localizations.ja: AIによるセッションの要約
localizations.tr: Oturumun yapay zeka tarafından oluşturulan özeti

doccAIBannerText.comment: Full disclaimer text shown in the AI-mode banner below the variant switcher. May contain the word 'Community Notes' referencing the other mode.

localizations.en: AI Notes (beta) are generated by a build-pipeline model from the session transcript. They can be wrong or incomplete. Switch to Community Notes for human-reviewed detail.
localizations.de: KI-Notizen (Beta) werden durch ein Pipeline-Modell aus dem Session-Transkript erzeugt. Sie können unvollständig oder fehlerhaft sein. Wechsle zu Community-Notizen für von Menschen geprüfte Details.
localizations.ja: AIノート（ベータ）はパイプラインモデルがセッションのトランスクリプトから生成します。誤りや不完全な場合があります。人によってレビューされた詳細はコミュニティノートをご覧ください。
localizations.tr: Yapay Zeka Notları (beta), bir derleme hattı modeli tarafından oturum transkriptinden oluşturulur. Yanlış veya eksik olabilir. İnsan tarafından incelenmiş ayrıntılar için Topluluk Notları'na geçin.

doccCalloutTip.comment: Badge label for Tip-kind callout blocks in DocC notes.

doccCalloutNote.comment: Badge label for Note-kind callout blocks in DocC notes.

doccCalloutImportant.comment: Badge label for Important-kind callout blocks in DocC notes.

doccCalloutWarning.comment: Badge label for Warning-kind callout blocks in DocC notes.

doccCalloutExperiment.comment: Badge label for Experiment-kind callout blocks in DocC notes.

doccStubEmptyTitle.comment: Heading shown in the empty-state for stub (notes-not-yet-written) articles.

localizations.ja: まだノートがありません

doccStubEmptyBody.comment: Body text shown in the stub empty-state, nudging contributors to write the first notes.

localizations.en: Be the hero who changes that. Watch the video, jot down what matters, and open a pull request – it's genuinely quick.
localizations.de: Sei der Held, der das ändert. Sieh dir das Video an, notiere die wichtigsten Punkte und öffne einen Pull Request – es geht wirklich schnell.
localizations.ja: 変えるヒーローになろう。動画を見て、重要な点をメモし、プルリクエストを開いてください – 本当にすぐにできます。
localizations.tr: Bunu değiştirecek kahraman ol. Videoyu izle, önemli noktaları not et ve bir pull request aç – gerçekten hızlı.

doccStubEmptyCTA.comment: CTA button label in the stub empty-state, linking to the contributing guide.

localizations.ja: コントリビュート方法を見る

doccNotesContributed.comment: Stat label after a number in the Written By block when count != 1, e.g. '42 notes contributed'.

doccNoteContributed.comment: Stat label after a number in the Written By block when count == 1, e.g. '1 note contributed'.

doccSessionLabel.comment: Word 'Session' used in the article eyebrow separator, e.g. 'WWDC25 · Session 361'.

doccContributorsEyebrow.comment: Small-caps eyebrow label above the contributors page hero title.

doccContributorsSubtitle.comment: Subtitle line below the contributors page hero title.

localizations.de: Die Menschen, die diese Notizen schreiben.
localizations.ja: これらのノートを執筆している人たちです。

doccContributorsAllHeading.comment: Section heading for the full contributor grid below the stats row.

localizations.ja: すべてのコントリビューター

doccContributorsAllLead.comment: Short lead sentence below the 'All contributors' heading.

localizations.en: Everyone who has contributed notes, sorted by number of contributions.
localizations.de: Alle, die Notizen beigetragen haben, sortiert nach Anzahl der Beiträge.
localizations.ja: ノートを投稿したすべての方を、投稿数順で表示します。
localizations.tr: Not katkısında bulunan herkes, katkı sayısına göre sıralanmıştır.

doccContributorsBecomeCTA.comment: Label for the 'Become a contributor' call-to-action button on the contributors page. Shown only when the contributorsBecomeHref config field is set.

localizations.ja: コントリビューターになる

doccContributorsStatNotes.comment: Stat label for the total notes written, in the contributors stats row.

doccContributorsStatYears.comment: Stat label for the number of distinct years covered, in the contributors stats row.

doccContributorContributionsHeading.comment: Section heading for the Contributions block on the contributor detail page.

doccContributorContributionsLead.comment: Lead sentence in the Contributions intro block. Dynamic numbers (note count and most-active year) are rendered by the Swift renderer directly; this string holds the surrounding static text.

localizations.en: Contributed %lld session notes in total. Most active year: %@.
localizations.ja: 合計 %lld 件のセッションノートを投稿。最も活発な年: %@。
localizations.tr: Toplam %lld oturum notu katkısı. En aktif yıl: %@.

doccContributorViewGitHub.comment: Link label pointing to the contributor's GitHub profile page.

doccMissingEyebrow.comment: Small-caps eyebrow above the missing-sessions page hero title.

doccMissingCoverageHeading.comment: Section heading for the per-year coverage bars section on the missing-sessions page.

doccMissingCoverageLead.comment: Short lead sentence below the coverage-by-year heading on the missing-sessions page.

localizations.en: How much of each year is already documented. The emptier the bar, the more sessions are waiting.
localizations.de: Wie viel von jedem Jahr bereits dokumentiert ist. Je leerer der Balken, desto mehr Sessions warten.
localizations.ja: 各年のどれだけが既にドキュメント化されているか。バーが空なほど、待っているセッションが多いです。
localizations.tr: Her yılın ne kadarının belgelendiği. Çubuk ne kadar boşsa, bekleyen oturum o kadar fazla.

doccMissingLearnCTA.comment: Label for the 'Learn how to contribute' call-to-action link on the missing-sessions page. Shown only when the missingContributeHref config field is set.

localizations.ja: コントリビュート方法を見る

doccMissingCountFormat.comment: Per-year coverage count chip on the missing-sessions page. Positional template (missing-of-total): %1$lld = missing count, %2$lld = total sessions that year. Translators may reorder.

doccMissingShowMore.comment: Show-more toggle label on the missing-sessions page when the year's extra stub cards are collapsed. Template: %lld = number of hidden cards.

doccMissingShowLess.comment: Show-more toggle label on the missing-sessions page when the year's extra stub cards are expanded.

doccSearchPlaceholder.comment: Placeholder text inside the DocC search overlay input field.

localizations.ja: セッション、フレームワーク、年で検索

doccSearchResultCount.comment: Template for the result count line in the search overlay. The literal substring '%lld' is replaced at runtime by the search script with the integer result count.

doccSearchNoMatches.comment: Heading shown in the search overlay when the query returns zero results.

doccSearchNoMatchesBody.comment: Body text below the no-matches heading in the search overlay.

localizations.en: Try a different term, or browse the sidebar.
localizations.de: Versuche einen anderen Begriff oder nutze die Seitenleiste.
localizations.ja: 別のキーワードを試すか、サイドバーを参照してください。
localizations.tr: Farklı bir terim dene veya kenar çubuğuna göz at.

doccSearchTry.comment: Label preceding the search suggestion chips in the search overlay ('Try: chip1 chip2 …').

doccSearchClose.comment: Accessible label for the close button inside the DocC search overlay.

doccSearchViewNote.comment: Link label in the DocC search overlay's preview panel that opens the focused note in full.

doccTocTitle.comment: Title shown in the on-this-page TOC rail on DocC article, contributor, missing-sessions, and home pages.

doccContributorsStatContributor.comment: Stat label for the contributor count in the contributors stats row, singular form (count == 1).

doccContributorsStatContributors.comment: Stat label for the contributor count in the contributors stats row, plural form (count != 1).

doccMissingHeroComplete.comment: Hero subtitle on the missing-sessions page when all sessions are already documented.

localizations.ja: すべてのセッションがドキュメント化されています

doccMissingHeroSub.comment: Hero subtitle format on the missing-sessions page when sessions are still missing. %1$lld = total missing count, %2$lld = number of years that have missing sessions.

localizations.en: Help document %1$lld missing sessions across %2$lld years
localizations.ja: %2$lld 年にわたる %1$lld 件の未作成セッションの執筆にご協力ください
localizations.tr: %2$lld yılda %1$lld eksik oturumu belgelemeye yardım edin

doccQuickReadAiHint.comment: Subtle hint line shown at the bottom of every Quick Read / TLDR card. The quick summary is always machine-generated, regardless of whether community notes exist.

localizations.tr: Yapay zeka tarafından oluşturulan hızlı özet

doccCorrectionsCTA.comment: One-line corrections nudge at the end of a session note's body; the whole line links to the contributing guide.

localizations.en: Missing anything? Corrections? Contributions are welcome!
localizations.de: Fehlt etwas? Korrekturen? Beiträge sind willkommen!
localizations.ja: 足りない内容や修正はありませんか？コントリビュートは大歓迎です！
localizations.tr: Eksik bir şey mi var? Düzeltme mi gerekiyor? Katkılar memnuniyetle karşılanır!

doccSearchFilterHeading.comment: Heading above the facet chip groups in the dedicated search page's filter aside.

doccSearchFacetYear.comment: Label for the Year facet group on the dedicated search page.

doccSearchFacetType.comment: Label for the Note-type facet group on the dedicated search page.

doccSearchFacetFramework.comment: Label for the Topic facet group on the dedicated search page (the values mix real frameworks with topic buckets like design or media, so the group is not labeled Framework).

doccSearchFacetAll.comment: The chip that clears one facet group's selection (selects everything in that group).

doccSearchTypeAI.comment: Short note-type chip label for AI-authored notes on the search page's note-type facet.

doccSearchTypeCommunity.comment: Short note-type chip label for community-authored notes on the search page's note-type facet.

doccSearchTypeStub.comment: Short note-type chip label for placeholder/stub notes on the search page's note-type facet.

doccSearchClearFilters.comment: Button that clears every active facet and the query on the dedicated search page.

doccSearchSeeAll.comment: Footer link in the ⌘K search overlay that opens the full search page carrying the current query.

doccSearchNoMatchesFilters.comment: Body text under the no-matches heading on the search page when a query or facet excludes everything.

localizations.en: Broaden your search or clear a filter.
localizations.de: Erweitere die Suche oder entferne einen Filter.
localizations.ja: 検索条件を広げるか、フィルターを解除してください。
localizations.tr: Aramanı genişlet veya bir filtreyi kaldır.

doccSearchPrompt.comment: Prompt shown in the search page's results area before the reader has typed a query.

localizations.en: Start typing to search every session and note.
localizations.de: Tippe los, um alle Sessions und Notizen zu durchsuchen.
localizations.ja: 入力してすべてのセッションとノートを検索します。
localizations.tr: Tüm oturumları ve notları aramak için yazmaya başla.

doccSearchLoading.comment: Status text shown while the search index shards are still loading on the search page.
